description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches the node_modules/ directory, uses the node:latest Docker image for the test_core job, and employs docker:stable images with a docker:stable-dind service for the code_quality and sast jobs, while the dast job runs on the registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/security-products/zaproxy image. In the test_core job (default stage) run "yarn global add node-gyp", then "yarn install", "yarn test", and "yarn build". In the code_quality job (default stage) allow failure, set DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2, compute SP_VERSION from CI_SERVER_VERSION, and execute a Docker container from "registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/security-products/codequality:$SP_VERSION" mounting the source code and Docker socket, then publish gl-code-quality-report.json as a codequality artifact. In the sast job (default stage) also allow failure, set DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2, compute SP_VERSION, run a Docker container from "registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/security-products/sast:$SP_VERSION" with SAST_CONFIDENCE_LEVEL defaulting to 3, mount the code and Docker socket, and store gl-sast-report.json as an artifact. In the dast job (default stage) allow failure, define variables login_url, password, username, and website, create /zap/wrk/, run "/zap/zap-baseline.py -J gl-dast-report.json -t $website --auth-url $login_url --auth-username $username --auth-password $password || true", copy the generated report to the project root, and archive gl-dast-report.json as an artifact.
